;SETTING_3 -unfinished\\ndefinition = custom\\n\\n[metadata]\\ntype = quality_ch
;SETTING_3 anges\\nquality_type = normal\\nintent_category = default\\nposition 
;SETTING_3 = 0\\nsetting_version = 22\\n\\n[values]\\ncool_fan_enabled = False\\
;SETTING_3 nspeed_print = 5\\nspeed_travel = 5\\nspeed_z_hop = 2\\n\\n", "[gener
;SETTING_3 al]\\nversion = 4\\nname = Bioprinter-unfinished\\ndefinition = fdmpr
